nos_summary.issuer: Harris County Municipal Utility District No. 182

consensus.reason: All agents voted Interested. Proceed to POS review.

agent_votes.rationale: Texas MUD GO unlimited tax — core coverage area and issuer type.
$2.93M par well within $25M single commitment limit. Good faith deposit of $58,600 is trivial.
Standard serial structure, net effective rate basis (standard for Texas), 1/8% rate increment, 97% min bid — clean and workable.
Small tax-exempt deal with 1-27yr serial range. Sweet spot for retail distribution. Unrated but typical for Texas MUDs.
Sale April 15 — 9 days out, sufficient for POS review. Only 1 other bid that week. 2 analysts available.
